description: A key feature of the product stops working because a third-party data provider's API is down.

nodes.task_description: Receive alerts that a specific feature is failing for all users.
Check the health of external dependencies and identify that the third-party API is not responding.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the root cause is external.

nodes.task_description: Update the status page to inform customers of the issue with the third-party provider and that functionality will be restored once the provider fixes their issue.
